hero.description: Senior Video Engineer with 10+ years in real-time video systems, immersive environments, and large-scale live productions. Core expertise in disguise (d3) — certified trainer.

about.paragraph1: I'm Yuri Stranyov — Freelance Video Engineer and VJ. 10+ years building real-time video systems for live events that can't fail — F1 concerts, world championship ceremonies, immersive installations.
about.paragraph2: disguise (d3) specialist and certified trainer. I work the full cycle: system architecture, multi-server pipelines, projection mapping, on-site leadership.
about.paragraph3: Based in Dubai, available anywhere the show is.
